hero.badge: DSE • TSA • HKAT • IELTS Professional Assessment
hero.title: LeoEd AI:
hero.titleGradient: Leading the Future of Adaptive Learning
hero.subtitle: Breaking the traditional 'one-size-fits-all' teaching model. LeoEd AI is a dynamic learning environment that continuously collects student performance data to personalize learning content, adjust difficulty, and provide immediate, targeted feedback.

philosophy.label: CORE PHILOSOPHY
philosophy.title: Learn, Evolve, Optimize (學習、進化、優化)
philosophy.description: LeoEd AI is not just a static content library. We are an AI-powered education system designed to be a reliable navigator, guiding students through complex learning journeys.
philosophy.learnDesc: Through highly personalized content and active engagement, help students master new concepts.
philosophy.evolveDesc: The system dynamically adjusts tasks, quiz difficulty, and learning pace based on your real-time learning progress.
philosophy.optimizeDesc: The system continuously refines its recommendations, fills learning gaps, and consolidates weak areas to help you achieve true mastery.

features.label: POWERFUL TOOLS
features.title: Powerful AI Tools Transforming Modern Education
features.adaptiveQuizDesc: Enjoy low-risk, high-frequency quizzes tailored for you. Our topic priority engine selects the most appropriate questions and calibrates difficulty based on student mastery, recent error rates, and forgetting risk.
features.aiGradingDesc: Get more than just a score. Our AI engine evaluates answers based on precise scoring criteria, providing detailed comments to explain scores, point out missing steps and conceptual misunderstandings, and offer specific improvement suggestions.
features.multiModalDesc: Submit assignments in the way that best suits the subject. Students can type text directly in the interface, use built-in tools to draw graphs and charts, or take photos of handwritten answers on paper and upload them.
features.feedbackLoopDesc: Assessment results directly shape students' subsequent learning paths. Quiz results automatically update student profiles to recommend targeted review videos and adjust future quiz combinations.

solutions.label: SOLUTIONS & PIONEER SUBJECTS
solutions.title: Built for Core Subjects and High-Stakes Exams
solutions.description: LeoEd AI is designed to support high-quality education across different subject areas through phased implementation.

accounting.subject: University Accounting
accounting.subtitle: Rule-Based AI Grading
accounting.desc: Our first pilot project uses rule-based AI grading for procedural calculations and structured steps, aiming to support competency expectations aligned with professional certification standards.

math.subject: HKDSE Mathematics
math.subtitle: Exam Preparation and Topic Mastery
math.desc: A scalable exam preparation environment designed to help Hong Kong high school students build topic-by-topic mastery and receive feedback tailored to their specific learning levels.

future.subject: Future Expansion
future.subtitle: Large-Scale Exam Market Support
future.desc: The proven system will eventually expand to support highly structured, large-scale exam markets such as China's National College Entrance Examination.

partners.label: TRUSTED BY LEADERS
partners.title: Our Partner Schools
partners.description: Highly trusted and recognized by the education community.

pricing.label: PRICING REVOLUTION
pricing.title: Transparent, Flexible Pricing Plans
pricing.updating: Pricing plans being adjusted, stay tuned

educators.label: FOR EDUCATORS & INSTITUTIONS
educators.title: Empowering Teachers, Building Smart Schools
educators.description: Transform teaching from standardized instruction to a highly responsive, student-centered system.
educators.insightsDesc: Track student performance at the micro level and clearly understand learning gaps across the class.
educators.timeSavingDesc: Reduce the burden of heavy manual grading. Our AI can reliably assess open-ended questions and chart answers, allowing educators to focus on high-impact teaching and personalized support.
educators.dataDrivenDesc: Use actionable analytics data to provide targeted remediation or alternative explanations when students need them most.

team.title: Core R&D Team
team.description: From Hong Kong Metropolitan University, specializing in speech and natural language processing technology.

footer.tagline:
Smarter marking for teachers.
Deeper learning for students.
AI-powered teaching, making education a joy.
